# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Datacenter Self-Hosted Build & Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: "Shell commands to build (executed with bash). Example: ./scripts/build.sh --target prod"
        required: false
        default: ""
      deploy_script:
        description: "Shell commands to deploy (executed with bash). Example: ./scripts/deploy.sh --env prod"
        required: false
        default: ""
      environment:
        description: "GitHub environment name (optional)"
        required: false
        default: ""
      runner_labels:
        description: "Comma-separated self-hosted runner labels in addition to 'self-hosted' (optional). Example: linux,x64,datacenter"
        required: false
        default: ""
      working_directory:
        description: "Working directory for commands (optional)"
        required: false
        default: "."
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: datacenter-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build_and_deploy:
    name: Build & Deploy (Self-Hosted)
    runs-on:
      - self-hosted
      - ${{ (github.event.inputs.runner_labels != '' && join(fromJSON('["' + replace(github.event.inputs.runner_labels, ' ', '') + '"]'), '')) || 'datacenter' }}
    environment: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment != '' && github.event.inputs.environment || null }}
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: bash
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory != '' && github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Validate custom scripts (manual runs only)
        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -z "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}" && -z "${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_script }}" ]]; then
            echo "At least one of 'build_script' or 'deploy_script' must be provided for workflow_dispatch."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Build (custom)
        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.build_script != '' }}
        env:
          GITHUB_REF: ${{ github.ref }}
          GITHUB_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
          GITHUB_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.repository }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Executing build_script..."
          eval "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"

      - name: Deploy (custom)
        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.deploy_script != '' }}
        env:
          GITHUB_REF: ${{ github.ref }}
          GITHUB_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
          GITHUB_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.repository }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Executing deploy_script..."
          eval "${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_script }}"

      - name: Default build on push (placeholder)
        if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Push to main detected. No default scripts configured."
          echo "Use workflow_dispatch and provide build_script/deploy_script inputs to run custom processes."
